ham.subject: Quarterly Benefits Update - Action Required
ham.body:
Dear Team,

I hope you're all doing well. I am excited to share the updated benefits package for Q1 2026. Highlights include:

• 15% increase in annual health‑insurance premium subsidy
• New wellness stipend of Rs 8,000 per employee per year
• Expanded parental leave to 18 weeks for both parents
• Optional retirement bonus plan now available for employees with 3+ years of service

Please review the full details and sign‑off in the employee portal by 15 March 2026. If you have any questions, reach out to HR at hr@company.com.

Thank you for your continued dedication.

Best regards,
Rajeev Singh
HR Manager

spam.subject: URGENT: Claim Your FREE Travel Voucher Now – 24H ONLY!
spam.body:
Hello Traveler,

We regret to inform you that you have won a $500 flight voucher! However, due to policy changes, this reward is only valid for the next 24 hours. To secure your voucher, simply click the link below and verify your identity.

Claim now: <URL>

Our team is on hand to assist you at support@vacationworld.com. Don’t miss out on this limited‑time offer.

Warm regards,
Nina Patel
Customer Service Lead
VacationWorld.com
